semantic.role: Defines architectural rules and constraints for the ArchSpine demo project
responsibilities: Layer isolation: enforce that API handlers can import from domain but not infrastructure directly
Documentation standards: require TSDoc comments on public domain classes and methods
outOfScope: Other architectural concerns such as testing, deployment, performance, or infrastructure configuration

English.purpose: This document establishes two foundational rules for the ArchSpine demo project to ensure clean architecture and readable domain contracts.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for developers working on the ArchSpine demo, especially those adding or modifying API handlers and domain classes. It guides them in maintaining proper layer isolation and documentation habits.
key_takeaways: API handlers must not import directly from infrastructure modules; use the domain layer as an intermediary.
All public classes and methods in src/domain should have TSDoc comments to keep architecture contracts clear.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档为 ArchSpine 演示项目制定了两条基础规则，以确保清晰的架构层次和可读的领域契约。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 面向参与 ArchSpine 演示项目的开发者，特别是那些需要添加或修改 API 处理器和领域类的人员。帮助他们维护适当的层隔离并养成良好的文档习惯。
key_takeaways: API 处理器不得直接导入基础设施模块；应通过领域层进行交互。
src/domain 下的所有公共类和方法应包含 TSDoc 注释，以保持架构契约的清晰性。
